title: Clionidae v0.1.1
content:
Clionidae took a meaningful step from static template notes toward a real planning and interaction surface. This pass focused on making the specimen more useful when choosing what should belong in the shared baseline and what should stay app-specific.

What changed:

  • Turned many of the specimen controls into real sample interactions so quick actions, section headers, dashboard tools, content actions, and settings controls now behave like a functioning site instead of decorative placeholders.
  • Added pastel-coded visual families and thin debug framing so shell regions, sections, component groups, form/table areas, and support modules are easier to distinguish while planning.
  • Expanded the standards layer with a dedicated routing standard, plus refresh/history/back-forward guidance that will support a later network-wide URL sweep across Clionidae, Feed, Peri, Battalion, and related apps.

The result is a stronger template checkpoint: Clionidae now works better as both a reusable app skeleton and a planning surface for future site architecture.
